name: Can I get workers comp if I fell from a ladder on the job in Utah?
description: Yes, Utah workers' comp covers ladder falls at work; report within 180 days.

mainEntity.name: Can I get workers comp if I fell from a ladder on the job in Utah?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Utah workers' comp covers ladder falls at work; report within 180 days.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Yes, you're generally eligible for workers' compensation** for on-the-job ladder falls in Utah, covering medical bills and lost wages no-fault.[1]

Utah law requires employers to carry workers' comp insurance for work injuries, including falls from ladders common in construction.[1] Benefits start after reporting the injury.

- File claim within 180 days (1 year for hearing).
- Employer can't retaliate for claiming benefits.
- Third-party claims possible if equipment defective.

Report immediately; consult a specialist if denied.
